questions: good level design er example ki
answers: Level design is the creation of game environments, stages, and missions that players navigate. It involves layout planning, pacing, enemy placement, puzzle design, and guiding players through the experience.
Level design holo game er map ar stage design kora — player kothay jabe, enemy kothay thakbe, puzzle ki hobe, pacing kemon hobe shob plan kora.

Great level design teaches players through play, gradually introduces new mechanics, and balances challenge with reward. Games like Mario, Dark Souls, and Half-Life 2 are famous for excellent level design.

Level designers use game engines like Unity or Unreal, plus tools like ProBuilder or TilED. Start by studying existing game levels, create blockouts (grey-box layouts), playtest frequently, and iterate based on feedback.
